reviews.review_description: The first few levels were fine, but for some strange reason in the bigger than they look or whatever trash that level was named, the weapons never show up for me. So didn't have any good defense to kill the fruits,so I had to restart the level, and it still did not work. And to make it worst that dang annoying diolauge saying how bad I am? Your dumb game ain't working!! If you short patience, stay away from this game, for now I'm deleting this
I got it on horizon + for free im not disappointed
If you love being a cashier while shooting fruits this is the type of game to buy
Great game.   I played it originally on pcvr but due to the art style I it loses nothing on quest.   Fun and interesting style despite being quite an old game.

Properly entertaining casual fun!

The developers obviously made a lot of effort with this.  Very polished. Also, they're probably at least a *bit* nuts.

Love it!

reviews.review_title: Why isnt this on PSVR2 Yet??!!
reviews.review_description:
I only bought this on Quest 3 because it was one of my absolute favorite games on PSVR1 but the CRAPPY Move controls made it such an annoying time w poor tracking and stuttering every loss felt like I was cheated. So I had so many hopes this would come to PSVR2 w updated graphics & Haptic feedback on the triggers..what a PERFECT missed opportunity that these devs COMPLETELY FUMBLED by failing to do a PSVR2 port..so I bought it here..and its bitter sweet as on one hand, I can play it wo tracking issues, on the other, same lower rez graphics, no haptic feedback , and limited play time restricted by Quest 3 battery. 
Is it a fun game?? Should you buy it?? Absolutely. 
Should the devs port it to PSVR2 w the above mentioned improvements ?? If they did would it be worth their effort?? Again, absolutely..MANY of us want this title on PSVR2

If you're the type of person that has to complete level challenges before you move on, this game has a gameplay loop that makes trying again fun instead of frustrating. 
There is a decent variety of both enemies and firearms, the tracking is good, and getting sarcastically quipped at over the loudspeaker hasn't gotten old yet.

reviews.review_title: Amazing game held back on quest 3
reviews.review_description: The game itself is amazing. Really fun and replayable. My only complaint is the lack of the physics and interactions with the environment in the quest version which it did have back when I played on psvr . It would be really awesome if this would be possible with a quest 3 update perhaps + some higher res?

I had this game on the original PSVR and bought it to again to play on my Quest 3. Even after all these years it still feels more fresh and innovative then any other wave shooter.Good amount of content between the different levels each with extra challenges and the variety of guns and infinitely replayable just because the concept never stops being fun.

P.S I didn't have any issues with the game not saving. It did try to do a cloud sync that failed the first time I played it but I just started the game anyway and everything has worked fine so far.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your 5 star review jac1002! It's great to hear you find Shooty Fruity just as fresh these days :-) Thanks for the feedback regarding the issues regarding saving as well, although we have a workaround it's good to know it's working without this.

reviews.review_description: I played the game twice and wasn't moved at all. As I don't want to dump on this game, it's very very boring and makes no sense at all to me. I guess this game is really for a certain type of child OR teen and even an adult maybe, but I got no excitement from it what's so ever. I love shooting or sniper games and this game wasn't it. I'll just have to keep looking until I find something that grabs me. I STILL LOVE MY META 2 AND THE GAMES/APPS THAT I HAVE AND AM SEARCHING FOR MORE.

developer_response.body: Hi Blazinrapidfire, thank you for taking the time to leave a review. We're sorry to hear you didn't enjoy Shooty Fruity, but based on your feedback we feel you may enjoy Phantom: Covert Ops!

reviews.review_description: My #1 game! I love everything about it, except I wish we could get our guns faster in check-out & packing like we can in the canteen by super sizing. Also, this game's been out for several years now. Any chance u can do another similar game or DLC please?? Maybe we can go to the different sections (i.e.meat, frozen, canned goods,etc) like u see in the checkout area & kill those kinds of foods from that section. Instead of the grape projectiles, a carton of eggs opens and launches at us lol. Idk, trying to think of something. Another game or DLC is looonnnnggg overdue! Thanks for this awesome game. Keep it up! 👍

developer_response.body: Thank you for your 5 star review niki.489154. It's great to hear you're enjoying the game. Unfortunately we don't currently have any plans to update Shooty Fruity, but we do really appreciate the feedback and new ideas.

reviews.review_description: Quest 3. Fun game but without saving progress it sucks starting over again.

developer_response.body:
[UPDATED RESPONSE] Hi Griffin, we've recently identified a workaround for this issue. If you navigate to - Settings > Storage> Find Shooty Fruity > Delete app data (this is the left of the two options available). This should allow you to carry on from where you left off. We hope this helps.

[ORIGINAL RESPONSE] Hi Griffin, I'm sorry to hear you've been experiencing the Quest 3 save issue with Shooty Fruity. Sadly, this is a known issue and the team are currently looking into how they fix this. We don't have a date just, but we're hoping to have an update soon.

reviews.review_description: Really disappointed, was enjoying the game and then seemed to not let me load it with a constant "syncing" status. Uninstalled game to reinstall it and this hasn't been possible either. Not happy to spend money on a game that won't even let me play it anymore.

developer_response.body: Thank you for making us aware of this issue, we're of course disappointed to hear that you've not been able to keep playing! So that we can look into this for you, please reach out to us at support@ndreams.com

reviews.review_description:
Don’t fall for it. It looks fun in the reveiws but after a few levels it gets boring.

I repeat do not waste your money.🤬

developer_response.body: Very disappointing to hear that you didn't enjoy the extended experience of Shooty Fruity as the game is largely much loved and offers good replayability. Thanks for sharing your personal thoughts on the game and we hope you find another title more to your liking.

reviews.review_description:
Poor instructions. We are stuck at job 1 shooting gallery & can't get any help.or answers. No option for setting to sit down.  We are using g an occulusxquest 2. 

Fyi. We have played many games and never get stuck do this is disappointing

developer_response.body: We're sorry to see you are experiencing difficulties with playing and progressing within our game. Please be sure to reach out to our support team so we can look into this for you. Email us at support@ndreams.com.

reviews.review_description: I could barely get into the game play. It’s not ready to be a game! So frustrating! I really hope I will get my money back!

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to provide us with a review, but we're sorry to see you're having difficulty playing Shooty Fruity. If the problems persist, please reach out to us on support@ndreams.com.

reviews.review_description:
Job simulator + Fruit ninja + Guns!

I'm gonna get the cons out of the way first:
Just gonna say right now that one of the only flaws is the graphics. I get that your trying to incorporate the cartoonish look but the graphics could use some work. The fruit doesn't look 3d enough. Their could be more design in things. Hopefully you come out with a big graphics update or something. Also I don't know if I'm doing something wrong but in the staff room I feel like I'm floating a foot or 2 above the ground. I reset the floor hight in the oculus main menu but it doesn't seem to do anything.

Now that that stuff is out of the way:
The concept of the store being under attack by killer fruit that you have to shoot while having to multitask and ring up groceries to get better guns, is very different from anything on the quest, in a good way. It's all even better with the hilarious commentary of your manage criticizing everything you do! Some of the stuff that they say gets a little repetitive but not too much.

Here are my rating for different parts:
Graphics 8/10
Audio 9/10
Gameplay 10/10
Instructions 10/10
Controls 9/10
Haptic feedback 10/10
Fruit shooting/multitasking concept 10/10
Comedy 11/10!

Here are some ideas I have for adding to the game:
-a locomotion option for moving around the staff room
-weekly challenges
-more detail in the graphics
-mini games
-multiplay mode where 2 people take a shift together defending the store.
-maybe the fruit could have voices. Maybe a watermelon could say "hello" in a deep voice when it gets close. Or apple could say things like "want a peice of me" or it could scream when it jumps at you. I think it could be kinda funny. And I think that comedy would fit with your manager criticizing you.

Hopefully a developer can reply to my review and let me know their thoughts on some of my ideas. This is a great game and I really want to see some amazing updates in the future! Hopefully the graphics get a little better too!

Thanks for an amazing vr experience!

I have been waiting and hoping that this game would come to the oculus ever since I first played this on the psvr I would highly recommend this game it is amazing funny and chaotic all in one it is great
This game is great and all but some times it expands out of my safe zone.
Love the game
